rules.statement: Operational knowledge MUST NOT be hardcoded in files when a database representation exists.
Source code, logs, and prompts MUST NOT contain raw secret values or API keys.
Every code symbol record in the database MUST have a corresponding vector entry in the memory layer.
The classes `CheckResult` and `AuditFinding` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/Finding.json`. Authority: ADR-056 D3.
The dataclass `Proposal` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/Proposal.json`. Authority: ADR-056 D4.
The dataclass `ActionResult` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/ActionResult.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1.
The dataclass `ProposalScope` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/ProposalScope.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1.
The dataclass `ProposalAction` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/ProposalAction.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1.
The dataclass `RiskAssessment` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/RiskAssessment.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1.
The dataclass `RefusalResult` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/RefusalResult.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1.
The Pydantic class `CheckResult` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/CheckResult.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1.
The dataclass `AuditFinding` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/AuditFinding.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1.
The ORM class `BlackboardEntry` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/BlackboardEntry.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1 Session 3.
The dataclass `ViolationReport` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/ViolationReport.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1 Session 4.
The dataclass `ConstitutionalValidationResult` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/ConstitutionalValidationResult.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1 Session 4.
The frozen dataclass `PromptModelManifest` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/PromptModelManifest.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1 Session 4.
The dataclass `ContextBuildRequest` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/ContextBuildRequest.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1 Session 4.
The dataclass `ContextPacket` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/ContextPacket.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1 Session 4.
The Pydantic class `EmbeddingPayload` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/EmbeddingPayload.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1 Session 4.
The frozen dataclass `ConstitutionalViolationPayload` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/ConstitutionalViolationPayload.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1.
The frozen dataclass `WorkerDeclaration` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/WorkerDeclaration.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1.
The dataclass `GovernanceDecision` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/GovernanceDecision.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 1.
The dataclass `ActionDefinition` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/ActionDefinition.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 1.
The Pydantic class `ExecutionTask` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/ExecutionTask.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 1.
The dataclass `TaskStructure` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/TaskStructure.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 1.
The dataclass `FlowDefinition` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/FlowDefinition.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 1.
The frozen dataclass `FlowStep` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/FlowStep.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 1.
The dataclass `RemediationResult` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/RemediationResult.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 2.
The dataclass `FixResult` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/FixResult.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 2.
The dataclass `AutoFixablePattern` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/AutoFixablePattern.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 2.
The dataclass `PatternViolation` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/PatternViolation.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 2.
The dataclass `ValidationResult` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/ValidationResult.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 2.

The dataclass `WorkflowResult` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/WorkflowResult.json`. WorkflowResult is the legacy workflow execution result; PhaseWorkflowResult is the constitutional successor. Both are in active use. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

The dataclass `PhaseWorkflowResult` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/PhaseWorkflowResult.json`. PhaseWorkflowResult is the constitutional workflow execution result. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

The dataclass `DetailedPlanStep` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/DetailedPlanStep.json`. DetailedPlanStep is the blueprint for a single AtomicAction in the Engineering phase. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

The dataclass `DetailedPlan` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/DetailedPlan.json`. DetailedPlan is the core Engineering phase artifact; get_steps_requiring_code() hardcodes legacy action names — constitutional violation pending fix. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

The dataclass `VectorizableItem` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/VectorizableItem.json`. VectorizableItem is the vectorization input; its payload dict is the drift surface before EmbeddingPayload governs the Qdrant output. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.
The dataclass `DriftReport` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/DriftReport.json`. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

The ORM class `AgentDecision` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/AgentDecision.json`. options_considered JSONB shape is ungoverned — fourth JSONB gap alongside ProposalConsequence, ConstitutionalViolationPayload, WorkerDeclaration. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

The Pydantic class `PolicyEvaluation` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/PolicyEvaluation.json`. PolicyEvaluation aggregates CheckResult findings; info_count is absent — INFO findings are silently excluded. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

The Pydantic class `RepoCensus` MUST declare fields that conform to `.intent/enforcement/contracts/RepoCensus.json`. RepoCensus is the canonical CIM-0 output format; already self-versioning via RepoCensusMetadata. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.
